title: Moroccan Chicken Tagine
description: A traditional North African stew made with chicken, smoky spices, and fluffy couscous.

ingredients.name: moroccan
ingredients.notes: ground cumin, ground coriander, ground cinnamon

instructions: Heat oil in the bottom of a large clay tagine or Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add onion and cook until softened, 5 minutes.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add chicken and cook until browned on all sides, 5-7 minutes.
Add moroccan spices, salt, and pepper. Cook for 1 minute.
Add chicken broth and bring to a boil.
Cover and transfer to the oven. Braise for 30-40 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Stir in chopped basil and cook for 1 minute.
Garnish with additional chopped basil, if desired.
